defaults.source_note: Fees can change by nationality, visa subtype, entry count, appointment center, exchange rate, service fee and courier/SMS choices. Always verify on the official fee page before paying.

types.what_to_prepare: Purpose, itinerary, accommodation, funding, return ties.
Invitation, meeting agenda, Ethiopian employer/business proof, funding.
Admission, tuition/payment proof, study plan, funding, accommodation.
Hospital/treatment letter, cost estimate, medical history, funding, companion proof if needed.
Work permit/approval, employer invitation, contract, qualifications.

schengen.source_note: European Commission short-stay Schengen fee: EUR 90 adults, EUR 45 children aged 6 to under 12; service-center fees may also apply. Long-stay/national visas use country rules.

types.what_to_prepare: Schengen form, passport, photo, travel insurance, itinerary, accommodation, funds, Ethiopia return ties.
Host invitation/accommodation, host ID/status, relationship proof, funds, insurance, ties.
Business invitation, employer/company letter, meeting agenda, funds, insurance, accommodation.
Treatment letter, appointment, cost estimate, medical history, funds, accommodation.
Admission, funding, accommodation, insurance and national visa checklist from the embassy.

united-kingdom.source_note: Use GOV.UK visa-fees tool for current exact amount. UK fees depend on visa route, length and where you apply.

types.what_to_prepare: Purpose, trip cost, accommodation, funds, employment/business/student proof, return ties.
Meeting/event invitation, employer letter, company proof, travel costs and return ties.
CAS/admission, funds, English/academic documents, TB/health requirements if applicable.
Private treatment letter, cost estimate, proof of funds, accommodation and return plan.
Certificate of sponsorship, job route, funds, qualifications and supporting documents.

united-states.source_note: Use U.S. Department of State fee and reciprocity tables. Visa application fee and any issuance/reciprocity fee depend on visa class and nationality.

types.fee: Check State Department MRV fee table
types.what_to_prepare: DS-160, appointment, purpose, interview story, funds and Ethiopia ties.

types.fee: Check State Department + SEVIS fee rules
types.what_to_prepare: I-20/DS-2019, SEVIS receipt if required, school admission, funds, study plan.
Petition/approval where required, employer documents, qualifications and interview support.

types.fee: Usually B2 category; check official fee table
types.what_to_prepare: Doctor/treatment letter, cost estimate, ability to pay, return plan.

canada.source_note: IRCC fee list shows visitor visa CAD 100 per person, study permit CAD 150, work permit CAD 155, biometrics CAD 85 per person where required. Verify before paying.

types.fee: CAD 100 per person; biometrics CAD 85 if required
types.what_to_prepare: IRCC account, purpose, invitation if any, funds, travel history, ties.
Letter of acceptance, tuition/funds, study plan, family ties, forms.

types.fee: CAD 155; open work permit holder fee may add CAD 100; biometrics if required
types.what_to_prepare: Job offer/LMIA/exemption proof, employer documents, qualifications.

types.fee: Usually visitor/TRV fee; verify IRCC route
types.what_to_prepare: Invitation, meeting plan, Ethiopian company letter, funds and ties.

types.fee: Usually visitor/TRV fee; verify IRCC route
types.what_to_prepare: Treatment letter, cost estimate, funds and return plan.

china.source_note: China fees depend on nationality, entry count and visa-center service option. Addis Ababa center publishes schedule/service notices; service fee notices mention ordinary/express/urgent service fee levels.

types.fee: Check Addis Ababa Visa for China fee schedule
types.what_to_prepare: Itinerary, hotel/host proof, passport, photo, online form and appointment materials.

types.fee: Check Addis Ababa Visa for China fee schedule
types.what_to_prepare: Chinese company invitation, Ethiopian company proof, trip purpose and dates.

types.fee: Check Addis Ababa Visa for China fee schedule
types.what_to_prepare: Admission notice, JW form where applicable, study plan and funding.

types.fee: Check Addis Ababa Visa for China fee schedule
types.what_to_prepare: Work permit notification, employer documents, qualifications and medical/police documents if required.

types.fee: Check Addis Ababa Visa for China fee schedule
types.what_to_prepare: Invitation, inviter ID/status, relationship proof and visit/residence purpose.

types.fee: Check Addis Ababa Visa for China fee schedule
types.what_to_prepare: Hospital invitation/treatment proof, cost/funding and accommodation plan.

india.source_note: India eVisa fees vary by nationality and eVisa type. The official country-wise eVisa fee table lists business/medical/conference-style categories; confirm Ethiopia row and route before paying.

types.fee: Check Indian official eVisa fee table
types.what_to_prepare: Passport, photo, purpose, itinerary, accommodation and funds.

types.fee: Check Indian official eVisa fee table
types.what_to_prepare: Business card/company letter, Indian invitation, meeting purpose and funds.

types.fee: Check Indian official eVisa fee table
types.what_to_prepare: Hospital letter, appointment/treatment plan, cost estimate and attendant proof if needed.
Admission, fees/funding, accommodation and academic documents.

united-arab-emirates.source_note: UAE fees depend heavily on sponsor/airline/hotel/government channel and visa duration. Verify the approved channel before paying.

saudi-arabia.source_note: Saudi fees depend on official portal route, purpose and insurance/service components. Verify through official Saudi route before paying.

turkey.source_note: Turkey fees depend on eVisa/sticker visa route and nationality. Verify on official Turkish visa/pre-application source before paying.

thailand.source_note: Thailand fees depend on visa type, embassy route and current consular fee schedule. Verify on official Thai source before paying.

south-africa.source_note: South Africa fees depend on visa type and local mission/VFS route. Verify with official embassy/VFS source before paying.

kenya.source_note: Kenya eTA/visa-related fees depend on official portal route and nationality. Verify on the official Kenya portal before paying.

qatar.source_note: Qatar fees depend on sponsor, airline/hotel/portal route and nationality. Verify on official Qatar route before paying.

egypt.source_note: Egypt fees depend on consular/eVisa route, nationality and visa type. Verify on official embassy/portal source before paying.

japan.source_note: Japan visa fees can depend on nationality and entry count; some categories may be exempt. Verify with Embassy of Japan official instructions.

south-korea.source_note: Korea fees depend on visa type, entries and embassy/portal route. Verify on Korea Visa Portal or embassy source.

malaysia.source_note: Malaysia fees depend on eVisa/embassy route, nationality and visa type. Verify on official Malaysia source.

australia.source_note: Australia fees depend on subclass. Verify through official ImmiAccount/Department of Home Affairs fee tools.

russia.source_note: Russia fees depend on visa type, entry count, processing speed and consular route. Verify with official embassy/consular source.
